code: import{AIPA_CONTROLL_URL}from'../config';const CHAT_ENDPOINT="".concat(AIPA_CONTROLL_URL,"/api/chat");const TRAIN_ENDPOINT="".concat(AIPA_CONTROLL_URL,"/api/train");async function requestJson(url,payload){const response=await fetch(url,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});const data=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));if(!response.ok){const message=(data===null||data===void 0?void 0:data.detail)||(data===null||data===void 0?void 0:data.message)||'Khong the ket noi AI service.';throw new Error(message);}return data;}export async function chatWithAssistantApi(payload){return requestJson(CHAT_ENDPOINT,payload);}export async function trainAssistantApi(payload){return requestJson(TRAIN_ENDPOINT,payload);}
